storyboard.content: I have been having pain in my right knee for about 3 months.
I have mild swelling around my knee, especially after I have been physically active.
The pain is worse when I climb stairs or after I have been sitting for a long time.
The pain is about a 4 out of 10. It limits some of my activities but I can still function. Over-the-counter pain relievers help but the pain keeps coming back.
This started gradually about 3 months ago. It has been stable and not really improving on its own.
I am a 52-year-old woman and I am slightly overweight.
The pain and swelling are consistently worse after physical activity and better with rest and pain medication.
